area: Taskflow close / lock cleanup / record commit
finding: ATM治理流程/收口UX自身不順：released task locks can retain an embedded `taskDirectionLock.status: active`, and `tasks lock cleanup --task` plus emergency `tasks lock cleanup --all-stale` can report success without clearing the lock. At the same time, `git record-commit --dry-run` accepts a cross-task `.atm/history` record packet that the real pre-commit hook later rejects as `ATM_CROSS_TASK_MUTATION_BLOCKED`, forcing operators into manual lock clearing and temporary generated-residue isolation during historical closeback. This is an ATM workflow bug, not an adopter project feature bug.
expectedBehavior: Released locks should not be treated as active by broker/pre-commit gates, cleanup commands should either remove or fully deactivate nested direction locks, and record-commit dry-run must match real hook behavior for cross-task history packets. Generated residue from sibling task evidence should have a governed defer/reconcile lane instead of blocking unrelated task-scoped closeback.
evidenceOrRepro: Dogfood during 2026-07-11 Team Agents closeback: `TASK-TEAM-0050` was `done`/released in live ledger, but `node atm.mjs lock check --task TASK-TEAM-0050 --owner coordinator --json` still reported active because `.atm/runtime/locks/TASK-TEAM-0050.lock.json` had outer `status: released` and nested `taskDirectionLock.status: active`. `node atm.mjs tasks lock cleanup --all-stale --actor coordinator --emergency-approval EMG-GLOBAL-ebee74b1f4 --json` reported 140 stale locks cleaned with `cleanupActions: []`, yet the lock remained. `node atm.mjs git record-commit --actor coordinator --message ... --dry-run --json` accepted staged low-risk records for `TASK-TEAM-0050/0051/0052/0053/0065`, but the real commit failed with `ATM_CROSS_TASK_MUTATION_BLOCKED`. `TASK-TEAM-0065.bundle-manifest.json` also blocked `TASK-TEAM-0050` task-scoped commit until it was explicitly moved aside and later restored/regenerated. Fixed on 2026-07-11 in stages: lock store now treats release markers with `released: true` or `status: released` as inactive even when an embedded `taskDirectionLock.status: active` remains; regression `packages/cli/src/commands/__tests__/lock.spec.ts` covers `lock check` and reacquire. `tasks lock cleanup` now marks embedded direction locks as released and reports `released-embedded-direction-lock`; regression `packages/cli/src/commands/tasks/__tests__/lock-cleanup.spec.ts` covers stale released-lock cleanup. `git record-commit --dry-run` now rejects multi-task staged record packets with `ATM_CROSS_TASK_MUTATION_BLOCKED`; regression `tests/cli/git-record-commit.test.ts` covers the dry-run parity case while preserving single-task low-risk record commits. `git commit --task ... --defer-foreign-staged` now also treats dirty/untracked foreign bundle manifests, closure packets, and close/reconcile/repair task events as explicit deferred governance residue instead of blocking the current task bundle; regression `tests/cli/git-commit-task-scoped-staging.test.ts` covers deferrable dirty foreign governance residue and requires an explicit warning.
followUp: Consider a first-class closeback setup lane for importing sibling ledgers before dependency-ordered taskflow close, but the blocking generated-residue dogfood failure is fixed.
